meaning: n.杀虫剂的一种,其商标名
examples: Experiments reveal that the grain and flour mixed with malathion powder is a good method in controlling angoumois grain moth.
Its main effective components are permethrin, Bassa and malathion, and it is compounded with synergistic and emulsion and is built by making up the surplus with fluid wax.
